title: euploca prostrata
intro: Euploca prostrata, also known as the creeping euploca or creeping morning glory, is a perennial vine in the bignonia family, native to Central America and Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Euploca prostrata has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and supporting cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of Euploca prostrata include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the leaves and stems in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
